title: dimocarpus longan var. echinatus
intro: Dimocarpus longan var. echinatus, also known as the hairy longan tree, is a variety of the longan fruit-bearing tree native to Southeast Asia and Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The hairy longan tree is said to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and promoting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the hairy longan tree is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
